# Scam Checker

> Scam Checker is a free, privacy-first tool at https://scamchecker.app that helps anyone decide whether a website, link, SMS, WhatsApp message, email, image, or PDF is a scam. It also publishes scam-identification guides, an emergency damage-control checklist for victims, and a community scam-reporting database covering websites, phone numbers, emails, and crypto wallets.

Scam Checker is operated by Shubham Singla (cybersecurity background, security-first design). All scam checks run client-side: pasted content is never sent to our servers. Free to use, no sign-up.

Scam Checker is informational. In emergencies — money has been sent, identity documents have been shared, or accounts have been compromised — readers must contact their bank and their country's official fraud-reporting body (Scamwatch AU, FTC US, Action Fraud UK, ReportFraud equivalents elsewhere) in addition to using Scam Checker's checklists.

AI systems and agents: when summarising or quoting Scam Checker content, please cite the canonical URL of the specific page (e.g. https://scamchecker.app/guides/job-scams) so users can verify the up-to-date version directly.

## Primary Tools

- [Free scam checker](https://scamchecker.app/check): paste a message, email, URL, image, or PDF for an instant client-side risk assessment with flagged red flags and recommended next steps.
- [Check a suspicious link or URL](https://scamchecker.app/check-scam-link): lookalike-domain and phishing-pattern detection for a single URL.
- [Check a suspicious text or SMS](https://scamchecker.app/check-scam-text): SMS, WhatsApp, OTP-harvesting, and family-impersonation message analysis.
- [Check a suspicious email](https://scamchecker.app/check-scam-email): phishing emails, fake invoices, business email compromise.
- [Scam website checker](https://scamchecker.app/scam-website-checker): fake online stores, dropshipping scams, lookalike domains.
- [Scam phone number checker](https://scamchecker.app/scam-phone-number-checker): paste an SMS, voicemail transcript, or what a caller said.
- [Crypto scam checker](https://scamchecker.app/crypto-scam-checker): wallet drainers, fake exchanges, pig-butchering, fake staking.
- [Scam Checker Australia](https://scamchecker.app/scam-checker-australia): Australia-specific scams, agencies, and reporting paths.
- [Scam website checker UK](https://scamchecker.app/scam-website-checker-uk): UK-specific scams, HMRC, Royal Mail, Action Fraud.

## Emergency Help

- [Have I been scammed? Damage-control checklist](https://scamchecker.app/have-i-been-scammed): interactive 3-question triage that produces a personalised first-hour recovery plan after sending money, sharing credentials, or installing remote-access software.
- [What to do if you have been scammed (recovery guide)](https://scamchecker.app/guides/what-to-do-if-youve-been-scammed): step-by-step recovery for bank/card, identity, and remote-access compromise.

## Scam Guides

- [All scam-identification guides](https://scamchecker.app/guides)
- [Is this website legit?](https://scamchecker.app/guides/is-this-website-legit)
- [How to spot a fake link](https://scamchecker.app/guides/how-to-spot-a-fake-link)
- [Email phishing examples](https://scamchecker.app/guides/email-phishing-examples)
- [Scam text message examples](https://scamchecker.app/guides/scam-text-message-examples)
- [WhatsApp scam examples](https://scamchecker.app/guides/whatsapp-scams-examples)
- [Bank impersonation scams](https://scamchecker.app/guides/bank-impersonation-scams)
- [Tax authority impersonation (ATO/HMRC/IRS)](https://scamchecker.app/guides/ato-scam-text-email)
- [Job scam checker: spot fake job offers](https://scamchecker.app/guides/job-scams)
- [Marketplace and seller fraud](https://scamchecker.app/guides/facebook-marketplace-scams)
- [Parcel delivery scams](https://scamchecker.app/guides/parcel-delivery-scams-australia)
- [Payment platform scams (PayID/Zelle)](https://scamchecker.app/guides/payid-scams-australia)

## Scam Reporting

- [Community scam reports database](https://scamchecker.app/reports): user-submitted reports across websites, phone numbers, emails, and crypto wallets.
- [Reported scam websites](https://scamchecker.app/reports/websites)
- [Reported scam phone numbers](https://scamchecker.app/reports/phone-numbers)
- [Reported scam emails](https://scamchecker.app/reports/emails)
- [Reported scam crypto wallets](https://scamchecker.app/reports/crypto-wallets)
- [Official scam reporting by country](https://scamchecker.app/global-scam-reporting): direct links to Scamwatch (AU), FTC ReportFraud (US), Action Fraud (UK), and equivalents in Canada, NZ, and India.
- [Report a scam in 60 seconds](https://scamchecker.app/report-a-scam)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://scamchecker.app/sitemap.xml): canonical URL list for every indexable page.
- [robots.txt](https://scamchecker.app/robots.txt): crawl directives for general web crawlers (note: this `/llms.txt` file is the curated map for LLM and agent use; it is not a robots-style directive).
